meta.note: Standardized plot reports. Every identified site follows the same schema; null/missing fields render as em-dashes so gaps are visible, not hidden. Coordinates are [lat, lng]. Deal terms appear only where the owner approved publishing them; the map is collaborator-gated.
template: identity: id, name, municipality, muniCode, status, sources[]
land: grossM2, parcelCount, landClass, features, orientation, elevationM
cadastre: refs[] (rc, label, areaM2) — outlines fetched live from Catastro INSPIRE
planning: classification{category, detail[{class,scope}], basis}, instrument, unit, buildableM2, capacity, density, cessions, path, constraints
market: price, terms, pricePerM2, comps, listingUrl — model readout joins from scores.json via muniCode
footprint: fallback polygon if Catastro is unreachable
masterplan: version, assumptions, zones[{id,name,areaM2,builtM2,program}], unitMix[{type,count,note}], principles[], phasing[] — BYLD design suggestion, indicative

publicRecord: asOf, title, sections[{title, rows[{label, value, url?, rc?}], note?, cadastre?}] — the second report tab. STRICT RULE: only facts a third party can verify in public sources (Catastro, SIU, BOCM, published instruments, open listings), source named per section. Nothing BYLD- or owner-sourced: no deck figures, no private terms, no fit/masterplan, no engine score. A section with cadastre:true reuses the live Catastro rows. Include a closing 'Not in the public record' section — verifiable absences are part of the record.

sites.name: Boalo — BYLD landscape estate

sources.label: Possible public listing match: 68,938 m² “urbanizable” El Boalo · €3.95M (idealista)

land.landClass: Catastro (verified 09-Jul-2026): parcela 1683501VL2018S, «PL SECTOR 1 B 1», El Boalo — 68,938 m². The «SECTOR» descriptor corroborates the SIU 'urbanizable delimitado/sectorizado' reading.
land.features: Meadow and dehesa giving way to pine and granite outcrops; stone walls; Torre del Parro on the horizon

location.accessNote: 0 km — on the buffer of the P.N. de Guadarrama (protected horizon)

detail.scope: CONFIRMED by the NNSS ficha urbanística «Sector 1B» (BOCM nº 174, 25-Jul-2011, pp. 232–233; copy in repo docs/el-boalo/legal): 70,484 m², suelo urbanizable, ordenación a definir por Plan Parcial. Concordant: SIU 'urbanizable delimitado o sectorizado' at 10/10 sample points; Catastro labels the parcel «PL SECTOR 1 B 1».

Residual counter-signal: the parcel sits in dehesa near the PRCAM and prior desk research expected SNU de especial protección. ENP/PRCAM + Red Natura services were down in-browser so protection overlays were NOT cross-checked. A protected overlay could still coexist with / override the sector.

classification.basis: Updated 12-Jul-2026: the Sector 1B ficha WAS located — in the NNSS text republished in BOCM nº 174 (25-Jul-2011), closing the 09-Jul open point. It confirms urbanizable sectorizado, Plan Parcial as instrument, execution by convenio + compensación. STILL VERIFY: PRCAM/Red Natura overlays (services were offline). Caveat from the same document: NNSS §9.1 lets the ayuntamiento re-system or desclassify sectors that breached their development program — Sector 1B's deadlines (PP 2 yrs, urbanización 8 yrs) expired decades ago. NNSS Dec-1996, no PGOU.

planning.instrument: NNSS El Boalo 1996 · ficha Sector 1B — desarrollo por Plan Parcial; ejecución por convenio con la propiedad + compensación (BOCM nº 174, 25-Jul-2011)
planning.unit: Sector 1B · 70,484 m² (ficha, = INSPIRE surface; sedecatastro prints 68,938 m²)
planning.capacity: Branded residences 5,392 m² · hotel 5,286 m² (44 keys) · spa + restaurant 5,110 m² · VPP 3,524 m² · parking 1,762 m²
planning.density: 25% buildable ratio · 75% (52,863 m²) held as dehesa & trails
planning.cessions: Ficha: net private residential land ≤50% of gross (35,242 m²), rest ceded to the Ayto with use fixed by the Plan Parcial (viario incl. Ronda Este section + ≥6 m green walk, parks, equipment); municipal residential inside the cession capped at 10% of the sector's aprovechamiento lucrativo — apropiable 90%, i.e. 1,762 m² of the 17,621 m² roof to the Ayto
planning.path: Deck assumes modular permitting, subject to municipal approval. The 25% / 17,621 m² buildability DOES have a basis: it equals exactly the ficha's 0.25 m²/m² × 70,484 m² — what is missing is the Plan Parcial that distributes it (never approved; ficha deadlines long expired, desclassification power in NNSS §9.1). VPP flag: the deck's 3,524 m² = ~40% of the 8,916 m² residential component — right at the line, but the statutory floor ROSE from 30% to 40% of residential edificability for nueva urbanización (Ley 12/2023 estatal, art. 20.1.b TRLSRU), so there is now zero margin; any terrain shortfall on the VPP parcel (as the engine shows) pushes it non-compliant.
planning.constraints: PRIMARY: likely PRCAM (parque regional) protected zoning — urbanization precluded in the A.2/B1 zones around El Boalo. Also: P.N. Guadarrama ZPP/PRUG buffer; Ley 7/2024 extends infraction/restoration window on protected land to 15 years; active local opposition (Ecologistas en Acción) with CM escalation track record against NNSS upzonings (Miragallos case, 2025).

market.terms: €2M down payment + €2M in kind at end of construction
market.comps: Probable listing match €3.95M/68,938 m². Product comps: pareados €550–645k new (€3,200–3,580/m² built), resale €2,060–2,680/m² corridor-wide (+8–19% YoY). Hospitality negatives: no sierra hotel transactions 2020–26; El Paular 44-key closed 11+ yrs, zero tender bids; boutique ADR €121–188; villa rentals €240–378/night; rural occupancy ~22%.

sites.fit: Full BYLD program IF entitlement achievable — currently high planning risk: no PGOU, regional zero-growth stance, PRCAM protection likely. €57/m² asking (matching 68,938 m² public listing at €3.95M) already prices in entitlement hope; genuine rustic dehesa trades far lower.

masterplan.assumptions: Deck program envelope respected: 17,621 m² buildable (25%), 75% dehesa untouched. All buildings prefabricated, on stilts, no excavation outside the core.

zones.name: Arrival & core
zones.program: 44-key landscape hotel (5,286 m²) + spa & farm-to-table restaurant (5,110 m²) + subterranean parking (1,762 m²). Compact cluster at the western access, screened by the first stone wall so the dehesa horizon stays clean.

zones.name: Residence contours
zones.program: ~27 branded residences (deck indicative count) placed on S/SE contour lines at 25–40 m spacing, each on its own contour, no fences — Echo ring units on the granite shoulder, Duo along the oak line, Grand at the landscape edge.

zones.name: VPP village edge
zones.program: Regulated housing as a compact 2–3 storey piece on the corner nearest the village/road — connected to town, not embedded in the resort core.

zones.name: Equestrian & farm meadow
zones.program: Equestrian centre + kitchen garden on the flat east meadow; light timber structures only.

zones.name: Dehesa commons
zones.program: 75% of the parcel held open: trail loop on the existing stone-wall spines, pozas path, dark-sky zone, no lighting beyond bollards.

unitMix.note: 1-bed circular, stilts — the signature; granite outcrop placements

principles: No excavation, no permanent scar: stilts + craned modular units
Stone walls become the circulation and trail system — nothing demolished
Protected horizon: nothing built against the P.N. buffer sightline; core hugs the access edge
Water discipline: greywater loop to landscape irrigation; pool only at the spa core
Dark-sky lighting throughout; residences reached on foot/buggy from core parking
phasing: P0 — Entitlement gate: verify classification; structure payments vs planning milestones; open dialogue with ayuntamiento on a precedent-scale modificación (26-home Miragallos scale, with VPP per Ley 9/2001)
P1 — Precedent-scale residential: ~15–25 residences on 2–3 ha nearest the village edge + trail commons (transaction-proven product; funds the hold)
P2 — Conditional resort core: hotel + spa only upon sector approval; design reserved in Z1
P3 — VPP delivery per instrument conditions; equestrian + farm meadow activation
codeBasis: Entitlement instrument: Plan Parcial per the ficha Sector 1B (NNSS 1996, BOCM 2011) — the sector exists on paper with expired program deadlines (gating P0: revalidate or renew the convenio before relying on it); schema drawn to Ley 9/2001 sector standards so it survives a fresh Plan Parcial or renewed convenio

VPP reserve ≥40% of RESIDENTIAL edificability for nueva urbanización — the Ley 12/2023 estatal (por el derecho a la vivienda) raised the art. 20.1.b TRLSRU floor from 30% to 40% (20% in suelo urbano no consolidado); the CM (Ley 9/2001, mod. Ley 3/2024) sits on top of that floor. Deck VPP 3,524 m² = 39.5% of the 8,916 m² residential component (residences + VPP) — essentially at, not above, the new line, and only IF branded residences classify as vivienda (if keyed as hospitality the calc changes). Plus: 10% aprovechamiento cession to the ayuntamiento; redes locales ~30 m²/100 m² built; parking ≥1.5 plazas/100 m² (met subterranean at core)
NNSS El Boalo 1997/98 height culture: B+1 / ~6.5–7 m in unifamiliar zones — Echo/Duo/Grand (single storey on stilts) comply by design; the 44-key hotel volume needs its own sector ordinance
Overlays prevail over municipal code: PRCAM PORN zoning + P.N. Guadarrama PRUG/ZPP; Ley 7/2024 15-year infraction window on protected land
CTE all DBs + wildland-urban interface fire criteria (DB-SI + Plan INFOMA): defensible-space strip around each unit in the dehesa, water reserve for hydrants at the core

commercial.thesis: RESIDENTIAL IS THE BANKABLE EXIT; the hotel fails every public benchmark. Zero sierra hotel transactions 2020–2026; the only 44-key comp — Santa María de El Paular (Rascafría) — has been CLOSED 11+ years and its operating tender drew zero bids; multiple sierra hotels sit unsold on the asking market. €500 ADR is ~2.7x the top boutique comp (Box Art La Torre €121–188), above whole-villa nightly rates (€240–378), against 21.6% rural occupancy. Underwrite hospitality at €130–200 ADR / sub-50% occupancy — at which it is amenity, not exit.
commercial.valueLadder: Proven product in Market B: 170–215 m² pareados at €550–645k (€3,200–3,580/m² — Moralzarzal phase II implies phase I absorbed); resale €2,060–2,680/m², riding +8–19% YoY. Phase-1 at precedent scale (15–25 residences × ~150–200 m²) ≈ €8–14M gross revenue potential IF entitled. Land at €56.7/m² remains entitlement-hope pricing; stage payments to milestones.
commercial.exit: Sell residences unit-by-unit (transaction-proven). Hotel/spa core stays conditional and small (amenity economics); consider operator-light models (villas + services) that the villa-rental comps (€240–378/night) actually support.

sections.title: 1 · Cadastre — Sede Electrónica del Catastro
sections.note: Sedecatastro consultation 09-Jul-2026: RC 1683501VL2018S resolves as «PL SECTOR 1 B 1», El Boalo, 68,938 m². The INSPIRE register carries 70,484 m² for the same parcel: the two official surfaces differ by ~1,546 m².

rows.label: SIU (MIVAU)
rows.value: «SUELO URBANIZABLE DELIMITADO O SECTORIZADO» at 10 of 10 points sampled inside the parcel (consulted Jul-2026)

rows.label: Catastro descriptor
rows.value: «PL SECTOR 1 B 1» — a named SECTOR, consistent with the SIU urbanizable-sectorizado reading

rows.label: Municipal planning
rows.value: NNSS de El Boalo 1996 in force; no PGOU. Full NNSS text republished in BOCM nº 174 of 25-Jul-2011; the ficha urbanística «Sector 1B» is at pp. 232–233: suelo urbanizable (ámbito no consolidado), ordenación to be defined by Plan Parcial

rows.label: Buildable ceiling
rows.value: 17,621 m² max roof — edificabilidad máxima 0.25 m²/m² × 70,484 m² sector surface (ficha prints the ratio and the surface; the product follows)

rows.label: Sellable (private)
rows.value: 15,859 m² — aprovechamiento apropiable 90% per ficha; the other 10% (1,762 m² of roof) belongs to the ayuntamiento

rows.label: Homes
rows.value: 78 viviendas max — densidad bruta máxima 11 viv/Ha over 7.05 ha

rows.label: VPP to create
rows.value: 7,048 m² if the whole ceiling stays residential (ficha uso principal: Residencial) — statutory floor ≥40% of residential edificability for nueva urbanización, art. 20.1.b TRLSRU as raised by Ley 12/2023; it shrinks to 40% of whatever the Plan Parcial keeps residential. How transitional rules treat a 1996-delimited sector: legal confirmation pending

rows.label: Private land
rows.value: 35,242 m² max — the ficha caps the net residential land of private appropriation at 50% of the gross sector (obs. vinculante 1)

rows.label: Public roads & cessions
rows.value: 35,242 m² min of land to the ayuntamiento — roads (including a main-road section reserved for the future Ronda Este with a green walkway of at least 6 m alongside), parks and equipment; the exact split is fixed by the Plan Parcial, interior dotaciones per the Reglamento de Planeamiento annex (obs. vinculantes 1–2)

rows.label: Plot rules
rows.value: 240 m² min parcel · 2 floors / 6.5 m max height · typology «AB-as.pa» · occupation and setbacks: según Plan Parcial

rows.label: Instrument & deadlines
rows.value: Plan Parcial (2-year filing deadline) + proyecto de urbanización (1 year) + complete urbanization in 8 years; execution by convenio with the owners + compensación. All deadlines expired decades ago — NNSS §9.1 empowers the ayuntamiento to switch to public management or desclassify a sector that breached its development program

rows.label: PRCAM
rows.value: The Parque Regional de la Cuenca Alta del Manzanares (Ley 1/1985, PORN published) covers much of the El Boalo area; in its A.2/B1 zones urbanization is precluded. Whether THIS parcel falls inside was NOT verified: the CM ENP and Red Natura viewers were offline at consultation

rows.label: P.N. Guadarrama
rows.value: Parcel sits against the buffer of the Parque Nacional Sierra de Guadarrama (PRUG/ZPP published)

rows.label: Ley 7/2024 CM
rows.value: Extends the infraction/restoration window on protected land to 15 years (BOCM)

rows.label: Local context
rows.value: Public opposition track record: Ecologistas en Acción challenges to sierra NNSS upzonings, with CM escalation precedent (Miragallos, 2025 — press and BOCM record)

sections.title: 5 · Market — open listings and portal data

rows.label: Listing
rows.value: idealista: 68,938 m² «urbanizable» land in El Boalo asking €3,950,000 (€57/m²). The advertised surface matches the sedecatastro surface of this parcel exactly

rows.label: Residential comps
rows.value: New pareados in the corridor €550–645k (€3,200–3,580/m² built); resale €2,060–2,680/m², +8–19% YoY (portal asking data)

rows.label: Hospitality comps
rows.value: No sierra hotel transactions on public record 2020–2026; Santa María de El Paular (44 keys, Rascafría) closed 11+ years and its operating tender drew zero bids; boutique ADR €121–188 published; villa rentals €240–378/night; rural occupancy ~22% (INE)

rows.label: Entitlement
rows.value: No APPROVED Plan Parcial, no convenio filing and no proyecto de urbanización for Sector 1B appears in BOCM or municipal records — the ficha fixes the ceilings in section 3, but the distribution (ordenanza, occupation, setbacks, VPP siting) only exists once a Plan Parcial is approved

rows.label: Transaction
rows.value: No sale, reservation or option on the parcel has any public trace

rows.label: Overlay check
rows.value: PRCAM / Red Natura parcel-level cross-check pending (official viewers offline at consultation)

sites.name: U.E. 18 — Calle del Pisuerga s/n, Colmenarejo
sites.status: On market · €244,900 · TEAM COMPASS · identified Jul 2026

sources.label: NNSS Colmenarejo 1996 · ficha U.E. 18 «Colonia de Santiago» (in listing photos)
TEAM COMPASS ad («5 parcelas», sewer in C. Cerca del Pino) — syndicated on wallapop/yaencontre/nuroa

land.parcelCount: Segregable into 3 parcels of 1,000 m² min (per listing); sewer on Calle Cerca del Pino axis
land.landClass: Catastro: urbana register (U.E. parcels) — listing header labels it «Urbanizable»
land.features: Open field between C. del Pisuerga and the Galapagar boundary dehesa, SE edge of town

location.accessNote: Access at Camino de la Fuente Elvira × Calle del Pisuerga

detail.scope: U.E. 18 — the 12 urban parcels + zona verde (execution unit in S.U., urbanisation pending)

classification.basis: NNSS Colmenarejo 1996 — ficha «Desarrollo de Unidad de Ejecución en S.U.» + plan P.3a «Calificación del suelo urbano» (both in the listing).

planning.unit: U.E. 18 — «Cerca del Pino» per ad / «Colonia de Santiago» per 1996 ficha. No official re-delimitation found (BOCM/municipal records, researched 05-Jul-2026): the ad’s 17,789 m² unit total and 10,894 m² «a la venta» are vendor claims; the ficha’s 27,122 m² stands as the only public delimitation. Ad shows a 5,932.78 m² «resultado de segregación» — private segregation activity; request the segregation licence + nota simple.
planning.capacity: Max 18 homes unit-wide (ficha) · sale portion ≈ 3-5 single-family plots · Zona SU-UE 18 Grado 3º
planning.density: Occupation 25% · edificability 0.25 m²/m² net · 2 floors + bajo cubierta (6.50 m eaves, 8.50 m ridge) · min parcel 1,000 m², 20 m frontage, setbacks 4/4/3 m
planning.cessions: 3,948 m² green space to the municipality («zona entre calles») + road network
planning.path: Estudio de Detalle + urbanisation project + compensación still ALL pending — no ED or proyecto de urbanización for U.E.18 found in any public record: zero execution progress in ~30 years (only a sewer main in Calle Cerca del Pino). Execution-risk precedent next door: Galapagar’s U.E.-7 «Fuente Elvira» has been stalled 15+ years since the Martinsa-Fadesa bankruptcy, with distressed plot valuations.
planning.constraints: Two zona-verde parcels (1,952.60 + 2,043.27 m²) inside the unit; abuts the Galapagar boundary. Heritage angle: «Colonia de Santiago» is a 1929 summer colony with catalogued traditional houses — check the municipal catalog. Must-pull documents (bot-blocked online): TSJ Madrid sentencia in PLANEA (expte. 61657, Colmenarejo) and the modificaciones list at transparencia.ayto-colmenarejo.org. Verify ordinance parameters: nearby TEAM COMPASS parcels quote 0.20 m²/m², 15% ocupación.

market.comps: Houses Colmenarejo €2,423–2,597/m² asking (+20–26% YoY; avg deal ~€748k); Galapagar registered: new-build €2,410/m², second-hand €1,910/m². New-build promos sell at €2,850–3,580/m² (Living Natura, Arroyo del Moral II). Finished plots ask €185–196/m² vs Madrid urbanisation benchmark €100–150/m² of land. Raw in-unit (subject) €46.6/m².

sites.fit: Small-scale entry: ~3-5 unifamiliar plots (Echo/Duo cluster) at €46.6/m² raw — not a retreat site; different asset class from Boalo

masterplan.assumptions: Sale portion 5,251 m²; ordinance per ad: min parcel 1,000 m², occupation 25%, 0.25 m²/m² net, 2 floors + bajo cubierta (6.5 m), setbacks 4/4/3, 20 m frontage.

zones.name: Villa parcels
zones.program: 4 parcels of ~1,150–1,250 m² fronting the Cerca del Pino sewer axis — each carries ~290 m² over 2 floors: BYLD Duo Lounge or Grand as a modular 2-storey villa with 900 m²+ private garden. Parcel lines drawn so each lot independently meets the 20 m frontage and Ø20 m circle rules.

zones.name: Shared entry & services
zones.program: Common drive + utilities corridor from Calle del Pisuerga; bin/parking pocket at the entry so parcels stay car-light.

zones.name: Green edge
zones.program: The unit’s zona-verde cession (3,948 m², outside the sale) lands «entre calles» — design the villas to face it as borrowed landscape toward the Galapagar dehesa.

principles: Front the existing sewer axis — minimize urbanisation scope attributable to this portion
One shared entry, car-light parcels; hedging not walls toward the green cession
Modular 2-storey variants of the BYLD cassette to stay under the 6.5 m eave
Buy-side design: parcel lines drawn so each lot independently satisfies frontage/setback/20 m-circle rules
phasing: P0 — Diligence: nota simple + segregation licence + who the remaining U.E. owners are (compensación arithmetic)
P1 — Control cheap: acquire at raw price; align/lead the junta de compensación
P2 — Execute the unit: ED + proyecto de urbanización (this step IS the margin)
P3 — Exit serviced plots at €170–250/m²; at most one modular show villa to anchor pricing
codeBasis: NNSS Colmenarejo 1996 · Zona 03 grado 3º (ordinance per listing): parcela ≥1,000 m² · frente ≥20 m · círculo Ø20 m inscribable · ocupación ≤25% · edificabilidad 0.25 m²/m² neta · ≤2 plantas + bajo cubierta · cornisa 6.50 m / cumbrera 8.50 m · retranqueos 4 m frente / 4 m fondo / 3 m laterales

Ley 9/2001 del Suelo CM: execution by sistema de compensación — cessions per ficha (viario + 3,948 m² zona verde) and urbanisation costs shared pro-rata among unit owners; parking ≥1.5 plazas per 100 m² edificable (min 1 per dwelling) within the actuación
CTE (DB-SE structure · DB-HE energy/near-zero · DB-SI fire · DB-HR noise) + CM habitability minimums apply to the modular units; factory-built path still requires licencia de obra against these DBs

commercial.thesis: HYBRID — margin is thinner than the raw/finished spread suggests. Plot exit comps ask €185–196/m² but the Madrid urbanisation benchmark is €100–150/m² of land (€40+ where networks are adjacent — the sewer already runs in the street axis, favorable here). Raw at €46.6 + urbanisation lands all-in near the exit price, so the serviced-plot flip alone is thin. The richer, transaction-backed prize: new-build chalet supply in Colmenarejo is ~3 small promotions while houses ask €2,423–2,597/m² (+20–26% YoY, avg closed deal ~€748k) — build-to-sell captures €2,850–3,250/m² new-build pricing on ~290 m² villas.
commercial.valueLadder: Exit plots: ~3–4 lots ≈ €0.7–1.0M gross. Costs: €245k land + urbanisation 5,251 m² × €60–120 (LINE-ITEM COSTING REQUIRED — CAM Base de Datos de la Construcción / Ayto. Madrid cuadro de precios) + carry. Villa route: 4 × 290 m² × €2,850–3,200 ≈ €3.3–3.7M revenue vs ~€3.0–3.6M all-in cost. KILL CRITERION: if the costed urbanisation exceeds ~€120/m² of land, flip-only or pass.
commercial.exit: Base: execute unit + sell 3 serviced plots + 1 modular show villa. Upside: build all 4 (scarcity supports it — only promotion-grade supply is 3 small co-op schemes from €368k). Data gap: per-municipality MIVAU transaction counts need a manual XLS pull; plot days-on-market unpublished.

sections.title: 3 · Edificabilidad — U.E. 18 ficha & ordinance, in meters

rows.label: Unit total
rows.value: 27,122 m² gross unit · 18 homes max unit-wide (ficha)

rows.label: Sale portion buildable
rows.value: ≈1,313 m² sellable roof — 0.25 m²/m² net × the 5,251 m² advertised; ground coverage capped at the same ≈1,313 m² (25% occupation)

rows.label: Per plot
rows.value: ~250–310 m² built per plot — 4–5 plots possible at the 1,000 m² minimum, each independently meeting the 20 m frontage and Ø20 m inscribed-circle rules

rows.label: Volume

rows.label: Statutory overlays
rows.value: 10% aprovechamiento cession (Ley 9/2001, suelo urbano no consolidado) and a 20% VPP floor on residential edificability for reform actuations (art. 20.1.b TRLSRU per Ley 12/2023) ≈ up to 263 m² of the 1,313 m² — whether either binds execution of a unit delimited in 1996 without new ordenación needs legal confirmation

sections.note: Parameters as printed in the ficha/ordinance reproduced in the listing photos; nearby listings quote 0.20 m²/m² and 15% occupation — confirm against the NNSS original before relying on these meters.

sections.title: 4 · Market — open listings and portal data

rows.label: Listing
rows.value: idealista 111936104 (TEAM COMPASS): €244,900 for 5,251 m² (€46.6/m²). Vendor claims, unverified: segregable into 3 parcels of 1,000 m² min; a plan in the ad shows a 5,932.78 m² «resultado de segregación»

rows.value: Nearby listings quote 0.20 m²/m² and 15% ocupación for comparable parcels — the exact parameters need confirming against the NNSS original

sites.name: Tamariu — Costa Brava plot

land.landClass: Catastro: urbano + rústico (parcela mixta) · planeamiento urbanizable
land.features: Wooded hillside plot in the Riera de Tamariu valley, ~1.5 km inland from Tamariu cove; pine cover, sea-facing slope

location.accessNote: CL Aigua Blava 17 / CL Salvador, Tamariu (Palafrugell); ~1.5 km from the cove. Plot = 2 Catastro parcels (7112106 core 8,326 m² + 7112110 access 2,052 m² = 10,378 m²; listing 11,147 m²).

detail.scope: Listing: urbanizable, calificado para residencial unifamiliar (chalets) y terciario (hoteles); 2 plantas edificables. Verify against the Palafrugell POUM ficha.

classification.basis: idealista listing; aparthotel project reportedly approved by the Ajuntament de Palafrugell. Not yet cross-checked against the POUM.

planning.instrument: Approved project (Ajuntament de Palafrugell) — per listing
planning.capacity: Aparthotel: 37 rooms (1,500 m² planta baja + 500 m² sótano garaje/técnico); OR 3 detached villas on ~3,700 m² plots each
planning.constraints: 2 buildable floors; verify Riera (watercourse/DPH) setback, Costas coastal-influence zone, and POUM sector conditions
planning.path: Aparthotel (approved) or the alternative villa scheme allowed by zoning

sites.fit: Costa Brava wellness/hospitality play: an approved 37-key aparthotel envelope 1.5 km from a top-tier cove, with a fallback 3-villa scheme — dual exit (operate vs. parcel-and-sell).

sections.title: 1 · Cadastre — Sede Electrónica del Catastro
sections.note: Two parcels: 7112106 (CL Aigua Blava 17, urbano + rústico, 8,326 m²) and 7112110 (CL Salvador access strip, 2,052 m²) — register total 10,378 m². The listing advertises 11,147 m²: a 769 m² gap against the register.

rows.label: POUM Palafrugell
rows.value: The applicable instrument; its ficha for this land is consultable in the Registre de planejament urbanístic de Catalunya (public). Not yet cross-checked against the listing claims

rows.label: Listing claims
rows.value: Vendor-stated, unverified: urbanizable; residential unifamiliar + terciario (hotels); 2 buildable floors; an aparthotel project (37 rooms, 1,500 m² planta baja + 500 m² sótano) «approved by the Ajuntament de Palafrugell». No expedient or approval was located in public records

rows.label: Overlays to verify
rows.value: Riera de Tamariu watercourse (DPH setback, ACA) and coastal-influence conditions (Costas) — both published regimes, parcel-level check pending

sections.title: 3 · Edificabilidad — what is public, in meters

rows.label: Public figure
rows.value: None retrieved yet — the buildable meters, use split and cessions for these parcels are fixed by the POUM de Palafrugell ficha, consultable in the RPUC (pending pull)

rows.label: Vendor claim
rows.value: 2,000 m² buildable — 1,500 m² planta baja + 500 m² sótano (37-room aparthotel), or alternatively 3 villas on ~3,700 m² plots; 2 floors. Unverified against the POUM

rows.label: Municipal share
rows.value: In Catalan delimited urbanizable the municipality takes a share of the aprofitament urbanístic (TRLUC) — meters computable only once the POUM ficha yields the ceiling

rows.label: Housing reserve
rows.value: Applies only to newly created RESIDENTIAL ceiling (the villas route): state floor 40% of residential edificability for nueva urbanización (art. 20.1.b TRLSRU per Ley 12/2023), on top of the TRLUC reserve regime — exact applicable % to confirm on the POUM ficha and transitional rules. The aparthotel route (terciario/hotel) carries no housing reserve

rows.label: Listing
rows.value: idealista 109756498: €1,300,000, exclusive (€117/m² on register surface; ≈€650 per buildable m² on the listing's 2,000 m² claim)

rows.label: The approval
rows.value: The claimed aparthotel approval: no licencia, expedient number or municipal acord located online — request it from the vendor or the Ajuntament

rows.label: POUM ficha
rows.value: Zoning class, edificability and sector conditions for these parcels: pending retrieval from the RPUC

sites.name: Estepona — Riviera Beach enclave, Cancelada

sources.label: Catastro OVC + INSPIRE, parcel records & geometry (12-Jul-2026)
SITUA/VITUA (Junta de Andalucía) — instrument in force & protections queries (12-Jul-2026)
Source dossier: docs/estepona/ in the feasibility-engine repo (LISTA, POT drafts, SUNP-E1, Catastro XML/GML)

land.landClass: Catastro register: URBANA (both parcels) — an urban enclave surrounded by rústico (polígono 5 of Cancelada). Indicative only: the binding classification sits in the PGOU 1994 / Adaptación planos, not yet retrieved
land.features: Coastal-plain enclave in Urbanización Riviera Beach, immediately south of the A-7, 450–500 m from the Saladillo shoreline; an unfinished 1987 commercial shell (7,120 m² built) stands on the small parcel, the rest is vacant

location.accessNote: Access road between the two parcels off the Riviera Beach urbanization grid; A-7 frontage on the northern edge

detail.scope: Catastro registers both parcels as clase UR (urbana), an enclave surrounded by rústico. The binding classification and ordinance sit in the PGOU 1994 + Adaptación Parcial planos («6.1 Clasificación adaptado», «6.4 Usos globales adaptado») — behind the town hall's session-gated transparency viewer, manual pull pending.

classification.basis: SITUA registry (12-Jul-2026): Estepona's general instrument in force = PGOU 1994 (CPOTU 27-Apr-1994) + Adaptación Parcial a la LOUA (Pleno 22-Dec-2010; BOP Málaga nº 115, 17-Jun-2011), still governing under the LISTA transitional regime — no PGOM tender or avance found. Regional frame: Ley 7/2021 (LISTA) + Reglamento General (Decreto 550/2022). Subregional: NONE in force — the 2006 POT Costa del Sol Occidental was annulled by the Tribunal Supremo on 6-Oct-2015; its replacement is only en tramitación (información pública Mar-2023).

planning.instrument: PGOU Estepona 1994 + Adaptación Parcial a la LOUA (BOP Málaga nº 115, 17-Jun-2011) · governing under the LISTA transitional regime
planning.capacity: 7,193 m² already on the register — the 7,120 m² commercial shell (1987) + a 73 m² almacén; whether the shell keeps its edificability or sits fuera de ordenación is unresolved
planning.path: Close the gap with a cédula urbanística from the Ayuntamiento — it settles the parcel ordinance, the shell's fuera de ordenación status and the urbanization reception in one document. Meanwhile the Adaptación's 13 texts + 37 planos are downloadable manually from the transparency portal (session-gated viewer).
planning.constraints: To verify at parcel level: Ley de Costas 500 m zona de influencia (the plot sits near its edge) and A-7 servidumbres on the northern frontage. SITUA WFS (12-Jul-2026): no vigente territorial protections intersect the plot; with no POT in force there are no subregional protections either. Context: the SUNP-E1 «Arroyo del Saladillo» sectorization (BOJA nº 106, 2022) put ~610,458 m² of planned growth around Cancelada — up to 1,712 homes pending Plan Parcial.

sites.fit: Costa del Sol enclave: 17,746 m² of urban-register land with a 7,120 m² unfinished commercial shell, 500 m from the beach and ringed by the SUNP-E1 growth zone (1,712 homes planned) — value hinges on the PGOU ordinance and the shell's status, both one cédula urbanística away.

sections.title: 1 · Cadastre — Sede Electrónica del Catastro
sections.note: OVC consultation 12-Jul-2026: «Riviera Beach 100» — 14,658 m² land, industrial register, 73 m² almacén (1987), otherwise vacant; «Riviera Beach 100(M)» — 3,088 m² land carrying a 7,120 m² commercial building (1987), the unfinished shell. Combined 17,746 m²: an urban-register enclave surrounded by rústico polígono 5 of Cancelada, immediately south of the A-7 and 450–500 m from the Saladillo shoreline.

rows.label: Regional
rows.value: Ley 7/2021 (LISTA) + Reglamento General (Decreto 550/2022), in force since 5-Jan-2023 — the LOUA is repealed

rows.label: Subregional
rows.value: NONE in force — the POT Costa del Sol Occidental 2006 was annulled by the Tribunal Supremo (judgment of 6-Oct-2015); the replacement POT is formulado y en tramitación only (información pública Mar-2023; unapproved per SITUA query of 12-Jul-2026), so it binds nothing

rows.label: Municipal
rows.value: PGOU de Estepona 1994 (CPOTU 27-Apr-1994) + Adaptación Parcial a la LOUA (Pleno 22-Dec-2010; BOP Málaga nº 115, 17-Jun-2011) — the instrument in force per SITUA, governing under LISTA transitional provisions; no PGOM tender or avance found as of Jul-2026

rows.label: Protections
rows.value: SITUA/VITUA GeoServer WFS (12-Jul-2026): no vigente territorial protections intersect the plot; with no POT in force there are no subregional protections. Pending parcel-level checks: Ley de Costas 500 m zona de influencia and A-7 servidumbres on the north frontage

rows.label: Adjacent growth
rows.value: Plan de Sectorización SUNP-E1 «Arroyo del Saladillo» (CTOTU Málaga 18-Mar-2022; BOJA nº 106): SUS-E1-A «Este» 526,605 m² max 1,477 homes + SUS-E1-B «Oeste» 83,853 m² max 235 homes — residencial turístico, IE 0.30 m²t/m²s, AM 0.268, 30% protected housing, each pending its own Plan Parcial

sections.title: 3 · Edificabilidad — what is public, in meters

rows.label: Public figure
rows.value: None retrieved — the buildable rights, ordinance and any ficha for these parcels sit in the PGOU 1994 normas particulares and the Adaptación planimetry (13 documents + 37 planos, incl. «6.1 Clasificación adaptado» and «6.4 Usos globales adaptado»), published behind the town hall's session-gated transparency viewer; manual download pending

rows.label: Built today
rows.value: 7,193 m² already stand on the register — the 7,120 m² commercial shell (1987) plus a 73 m² almacén. Whether the shell retains its edificability or sits fuera de ordenación cannot be determined from public records

rows.label: Nearest benchmark
rows.value: IE 0.30 m²t/m²s with 30% protected housing — the SUNP-E1 sectorization next door; that arithmetic applied to the 17,746 m² enclave would give ~5,324 m²t, but it is strictly indicative: SUNP-E1 does not govern this urban-register enclave

rows.label: Roads & urbanization
rows.value: The Riviera Beach urbanization grid already exists on the ground; whether the Ayuntamiento has received the urbanization (and so who maintains the roads) is unverified

rows.label: Ordinance & meters
rows.value: Exact zoning, edificability and the shell's fuera de ordenación status — a cédula urbanística from the Ayuntamiento settles all three definitively

rows.label: Transaction
rows.value: No public listing, sale or reservation matched to these two cadastral references (searched 12-Jul-2026)

rows.label: Costas / A-7
rows.value: Parcel-level check of the 500 m coastal influence zone and the highway servidumbres pending
